text.name: ec_materialsSupplyHint
text.text: To supply materials, bring them to the fence.

text.name: ec_cancelConfirm
text.text: Cancel this construction project? You will receive a %d%% refund of the amount paid so far.

text.name: setting_ec_constructionEnabled_tooltip
text.text: When enabled, placing buildings creates a multi-phase construction project. When disabled, buildings are placed instantly as per the base game.

text.name: setting_ec_labourFraction_tooltip
text.text: Percentage of total building cost allocated to labour. The deposit is deducted from this amount, and the remainder is paid over the construction phases. Higher values mean less material is needed but more cash is spent directly.

text.name: setting_ec_materialSupplyBonus_tooltip
text.text: Bonus applied when you supply materials yourself. A higher bonus means fewer materials are required to cover the material cost.

text.name: ec_cannotDeleteFence
text.text: Construction fences cannot be removed while a project is active.

text.name: setting_ec_resourceWeight_BOARDS_tooltip
text.text: How much of the material budget is covered by Boards. Higher values mean more of the total cost is covered by Boards. Set to 0 to exclude. If all are 0, the budget is split equally.

text.name: setting_ec_resourceWeight_PLANKS_tooltip
text.text: How much of the material budget is covered by Planks. Higher values mean more of the total cost is covered by Planks. Set to 0 to exclude. If all are 0, the budget is split equally.

text.name: setting_ec_resourceWeight_WOODBEAM_tooltip
text.text: How much of the material budget is covered by Wood Beams. Higher values mean more of the total cost is covered by Wood Beams. Set to 0 to exclude. If all are 0, the budget is split equally.

text.name: setting_ec_resourceWeight_CEMENT_tooltip
text.text: How much of the material budget is covered by Cement. Higher values mean more of the total cost is covered by Cement. Set to 0 to exclude. If all are 0, the budget is split equally.

text.name: setting_ec_resourceWeight_PREFABWALL_tooltip
text.text: How much of the material budget is covered by Prefab Walls. Higher values mean more of the total cost is covered by Prefab Walls. Set to 0 to exclude. If all are 0, the budget is split equally.

text.name: setting_ec_resourceWeight_CEMENTBRICKS_tooltip
text.text: How much of the material budget is covered by Cement Bricks. Higher values mean more of the total cost is covered by Cement Bricks. Set to 0 to exclude. If all are 0, the budget is split equally.

text.name: setting_ec_resourceWeight_ROOFPLATES_tooltip
text.text: How much of the material budget is covered by Roof Plates. Higher values mean more of the total cost is covered by Roof Plates. Set to 0 to exclude. If all are 0, the budget is split equally.

text.name: setting_ec_resourceWeight_WATER_tooltip
text.text: How much of the material budget is covered by Water. Higher values mean more of the total cost is covered by Water. Set to 0 to exclude. If all are 0, the budget is split equally.

text.name: setting_ec_resourceWeight_CONSTRUCTIONGRAVEL_tooltip
text.text: How much of the material budget is covered by Construction Gravel. Higher values mean more of the total cost is covered by Construction Gravel. Set to 0 to exclude. If all are 0, the budget is split equally.

text.name: setting_ec_resourceWeight_GRAVEL_tooltip
text.text: How much of the material budget is covered by Gravel. Higher values mean more of the total cost is covered by Gravel. Set to 0 to exclude. If all are 0, the budget is split equally.

text.name: setting_ec_resourceWeight_STONE_tooltip
text.text: How much of the material budget is covered by Stones. Higher values mean more of the total cost is covered by Stones. Set to 0 to exclude. If all are 0, the budget is split equally.

text.name: setting_ec_resourceWeight_CRUSHEDSTONE_tooltip
text.text: How much of the material budget is covered by Crushed Stone. Higher values mean more of the total cost is covered by Crushed Stone. Set to 0 to exclude. If all are 0, the budget is split equally.
